project.name: audio_kill_detector
project.summary: # Audio Kill Detector ## Overview Audio-based kill event detector for Valorant clips. ## Architecture converts video to mono WAV (22050Hz). builds fixed-size feature vectors.

project docs/project_idea.md.role: You are a senior ML + audio signal processing engineer.

.code-review-graph/wiki/index.md.role: Auto-generated documentation from the code knowledge graph community structure.

kill_detector/requirements.txt.role: with compatible pinned versions for numpy, librosa, scikit-learn, ffmpeg-python, and scipy/soundfile/joblib as needed by these libraries.

kill_detector/src/utils.py.role: Create utility module with typed helpers for logger setup, mkdir/ensure-directory, safe JSON writing, mp4 file discovery, and timestamp filtering with minimum gap.

kill_detector/src/audio_extractor.py.role: Implement FFmpeg-based audio extraction service using ffmpeg-python.

kill_detector/src/onset_detector.py.role: Implement onset detector using librosa.onset.onset_detect that returns sorted candidate timestamps in seconds.

kill_detector/src/feature_extractor.py.role: Implement feature extractor for 0.5 second windows: MFCC(13) mean+std, spectral centroid mean+std, zero crossing rate mean+std, spectral rolloff mean+std.

kill_detector/src/train_model.py.role: Implement training pipeline that reads labeled clips from kill_detector/data/samples/kill and kill_detector/data/samples/non_kill, extracts features, trains RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=100),...

kill_detector/src/predict.py.role: Implement inference pipeline that loads model, extracts WAV from video, finds onset candidates, extracts 0.5s windows, computes features, predicts probabilities, keeps events above confidence...

kill_detector/tests/test_feature_extract.role: Add unit tests validating feature extractor returns deterministic fixed-size vectors and handles short synthetic audio arrays safely.

kill_detector/tests/test_post_processing.role: Add unit tests for timestamp gap filtering behavior ensuring events under minimum gap are collapsed correctly while preserving ordering.

kill_detector/tests/test_onset_detector..role: Add unit tests for onset detector edge cases: empty signal, very short clip, and synthetic transient signal producing non-negative sorted timestamps.

docs.title: project_idea
docs.summary: You are a senior ML + audio signal processing engineer. Build a complete Python project that detects "kill events" from Valorant gameplay videos using audio classification. The system must be modular, production-ready, and optimized for accuracy + speed.
